name: Mrs. f Pumpkin Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a small bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, using an electric mixer on low speed, beat butter until creamy. Add sugars and beat until well blended.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla.
5. Stir pumpkin puree into batter.
6. Gradually stir in dry ingredients.
7. Form dough into 1-inch balls and place on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Turn off oven and let cookies cool on the sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
